Alexandra Reed

Senior Associate

New York

areed@exemplar.example.com

Overview

Alexandra Reed advises clients on complex commercial litigation and arbitration matters. She has represented major financial institutions in cross-border disputes before domestic and international tribunals.

Practice Areas

  • Commercial Litigation
  • International Arbitration
  • Financial Services Disputes
  • Securities Litigation

Office

New York

  • New Jersey, 2018

Education

  • B.A., University of Michigan, 2014
